document:
# Output.ai Cache TTL

Output SDK supports two ephemeral cache TTL settings for Anthropic models: the default 5-minute window and an extended 1-hour window. Both are billed at the cache-write rate on first write and the cache-read rate on subsequent reads. The 1-hour window costs roughly 2x the 5-minute write rate but amortizes across many more calls.

# Minimum Token Threshold

Anthropic requires at least 1024 input tokens for Sonnet models and 2048 for Haiku models before a cache breakpoint will be honoured. Smaller prefixes are sent uncached.

# Billing

Cache reads are billed at approximately 10% of the standard input rate. Cache writes are billed at approximately 125% of the standard input rate. The break-even point is roughly 2 reads of the same cached prefix.
questions: What is the minimum token threshold for Haiku models?
What is the break-even point for cache writes?
